problem: What catalyst efficiently converts atmospheric CO2 to useful compounds at ambient conditions?
hypothesis: If Phytoremediation with hyperaccumulator plant species is applied to at, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Sensor network monitoring with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
